tests.name: GET /api/settings - returns default settings if none exist
POST /api/settings/update - updates settings with deep merge
POST /api/settings/update - validates risk limits (daily < max)
POST /api/settings/update - validates max_per_trade >= 1000
GET /api/settings/trading-status - checks trading schedule
POST /api/initialize - initializes portfolio
GET /api/portfolio - returns portfolio with simulated P&L
GET /api/stats - returns overall statistics
GET /api/combined-status - returns dashboard status for PAPER mode
GET /api/news/fetch - fetches demo news, runs sentiment analysis
GET /api/news/latest - returns stored news sorted by date
GET /api/signals/latest - returns signals sorted by date
GET /api/signals/active - returns active signals only
GET /api/trades/active - returns open trades with simulated live P&L
GET /api/trades/today - returns today's trade summary
GET /api/trades/history - returns all trades sorted by date
POST /api/auto-exit/check - checks open trades for target/stoploss exit
POST /api/auto-settings/update - updates auto-trading settings
GET /api/auto-settings - returns current auto-trading settings
POST /api/test/generate-trade - generates trade from existing news
GET /api/upstox/auth-url - returns error without broker config
GET /api/upstox/connection - returns disconnected without token
FULL PIPELINE: fetch news -> generate signal -> execute trade -> auto-exit
